description_for_human: Scans Outlook emails and returns sorted/unsorted table counts per database.
description_for_model: Use this action when the user wants to scan their Outlook inbox for database table reports. Returns a structured JSON object with database names and their sorted/unsorted table counts extracted from email content.

functions.name: ScanAndSummarize
functions.description: Reads the user's Outlook inbox, finds emails that mention database tables, and returns a summary of sorted vs unsorted table counts per database.

days.description: How many days back to scan emails. Default is 7.

databaseFilter.description: Optional: filter results to only a specific database name. Leave empty to return all databases.
